root_cause: The React City dropdown read its cities from window.EHM_POST_AD_FORM, but that object was supplied later by a route-loaded helper. In affected browser/WebView loads the React component rendered without that object, so only the hard-coded Other / Not listed option remained.
fix: The complete 25-district city map is now embedded inside the production React bundle and is available before the Contact step renders.
District matching is normalized, so Kandy, Kandy District, case differences and extra spaces resolve to the same list.
The category helper and non-React fallback now reuse the same canonical getter.
No OTP, authentication, image upload, dashboard, ad-detail or performance logic was replaced.
